purpose: General output-reliability rules — domain-agnostic. The gate flags; your model still reasons and produces the fix. Tripwires, not verdicts.

tripwires.fires_on: A factual claim with a figure (a $ amount, %, or named metric) on a line with no source
tripwires.requires: An inline source tag — (source, date) / as of … / a date — or omit the number

tripwires.fires_on: A number/fact not supported by the provided source (caught by the cross-model verifier, not regex)
tripwires.requires: Trace every figure to source, or write UNKNOWN

notes: This is the default, general pack. Domain packs (e.g. rules/cfo.json — block a spend with no reasoned verdict) layer on top when your content is in that domain. Never asks the model to 'show its thinking' (reasoning_extraction-safe): it checks for grounds, not chain-of-thought.
